name: Parmesan-Crusted Soft-Shell Crab Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 8 soft-shell crabs, cleaned and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix 1 cup flour with Parmesan, salt, and pepper. Make a well in the center and add eggs, water (1/4 cup), Tabasco, and olive oil. Beat until smooth. Set aside for at least 30 minutes.
2. In another bowl, combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, thyme, remaining olive oil, and Tabasco. Whisk to blend. Let rest for at least 30 minutes (prepare up to 1 day ahead; refrigerate batter and mayo).
3. Preheat oven to 250°F.
4. Heat peanut oil in a large skillet to 350°F.
5. Dust crabs with remaining flour, shake off excess, then dip in batter. Fry 4 crabs at a time until golden brown (2-3 minutes per side). Drain on paper towels and place on a heatproof platter. Repeat with remaining crabs.
6. Hollow out center of rolls slightly. Spread 2 teaspoons mayo on each half. Assemble sandwiches by placing tomatoes, arugula, and fried crab on bottom roll. Cover with top roll. Serve immediately. Serves 8.
